name: Chicken & Dumplings
recipeInstructions:
1. In an 8-10 quart saucepan with a lid, stew the hen in water until tender with salt and pepper.
2. Remove the hen, skin, and debone; set aside.
3. Mix flour, baking soda, 1/2 teaspoon pepper, and 1/2 teaspoon salt.
4. Cut in Crisco until crumbles form.
5. Add buttermilk. Mix well.
6. Turn dough out onto a well-floured surface and roll thinly to make rectangles about 17 by 25 inches.
7. Bring chicken broth to a boil and drop dumplings one at a time into the pot, keeping them separated.
8. Simmer for 15 minutes.
9. Serve immediately. You may return the chicken to the pot or serve separately.
